title: pentameris scandens
intro: Pentameris scandens, also known as Mountain Wood Grass or Mountain Bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pentameris scandens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Pentameris scandens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues.
